pathOptions.nameEn: B.Sc. in Medical Sciences — Medicine (Pre-clinical Years)
pathOptions.description: > Advanced Technical English B must be completed by the end of semester 4 (for students required to take it). > At most 30 credit points may be accumulated per semester. Selected from a list including (2.0 נ"ז each unless otherwise noted): - 02750109 רוח חדשה 1 - 02750110 רוח חדש

pathOptions.nameHe: תכנית לימודים לתואר כפול ברפואה והנדסה ביו-רפואית
pathOptions.nameEn: Dual Degree — Medicine and Biomedical Engineering
pathOptions.description: - בוגר למדעים (B.Sc.) במדעי הרפואה - מוסמך למדעים (B.Sc.) בהנדסה ביו-רפואית - M.D. (after completing clinical years — see [[track-medicine-md]]) To train graduates with deep knowledge in both engineering and medicine, enabling them to integrate and lead in each domain separately

To train graduates with deep knowledge in both computer science and med

pathOptions.nameHe: מסלול משולב רפואה + הנדסת נתונים ומידע
pathOptions.nameEn: Medicine + Data and Information Engineering Dual Track
pathOptions.description: Dual MD + B.Sc. program combining [[faculty-medicine]] with [[faculty-dds]] (DNE track). See [[program-dual-medicine]] for the full curriculum. Must include at least **5.0 credits** from the dual-degree DNE elective list and at least **1 course marked #** (data-intensive project)
pathOptions.duration: ~5 years pre-clinical + 3 clinical years for M.D.

pathOptions.description: > **Important:** This program plan is for students beginning their clinical division (year 4) in academic year תשפ"ו (2025/2026). > National licensing exams are national-level (ארציות). The forum of deans may transition to a unified national licensing exam. > These rotations may

pathOptions.name: מסלול ריפוי בעיסוק
pathOptions.description: B.Sc. program in occupational therapy offered by [[faculty-medicine]]. Trains occupational therapists with a strong science and medicine foundation. Combines biological sciences, anatomy, physiology, psychology, and applied occupational therapy practice in clinical settings. _Ful

pathOptions.name: התכנית הבין-יחידתית למתמטיקה שימושית
pathOptions.description: The Technion operates a unique program in Israel and worldwide for advanced studies (Master's and Doctoral) in Applied Mathematics. The program is offered within an inter-unit framework for advanced degrees in Applied Mathematics. Administratively concentrated in the **Faculty of

pathOptions.name: התכנית הבין-יחידתית למערכות אוטונומיות ורובוטיקה

pathOptions.description: - MSc with thesis: מגיסטר למדעים במערכות אוטונומיות ורובוטיקה - ME without thesis: מגיסטר למערכות אוטונומיות ורובוטיקה - PhD: דוקטור לפילוסופיה Program Secretariat (Interdisciplinary Program): Tel: 077-887-3197 / 073-378-7276 | Email: tasp-grad@technion.ac.il - Aerospace Engineer

pathOptions.nameEn: Design and Production Management (Interdisciplinary Program, Technion)
pathOptions.description: Program Coordinator (Rakezeit): Dana Alush Tel: 073-3783189 | Email: danaal@me.technion.ac.il - Mechanical Engineering (הנדסת מכונות) - Aerospace Engineering (הנדסת אוירונוטיקה וחלל) - Industrial Engineering and Management (הנדסת תעשיה וניהול) - Materials Science and Engineering

knownLimitations: Focus-chain choose-N semantics are encoded as non-executable pools when present.
Science placeholder rows without course codes are omitted.
Tracks without a full Technion program code require overrides in track_program_code_overrides.json.
Vault wiki sign-off: non-executable rules are advisory-only; 43 catalog refs are production-excluded.

vaultSignoff.notes: Vault wiki sign-off: non-executable requirement groups are advisory-only in production. Catalog course references outside the DDS ingest scope are excluded from production course ingestion but remain as reference-only metadata in vault-backed requirements.
